market.summary: Global art market sees 4% growth in 2025 to $59.6 billion; US leads with 44% of market share. Sentiment is cautiously optimistic for 2026, though geopolitical instability remains a key factor.
keyTrends: 4% increase in global art sales to $59.6B
Public auction sales up 9%, dealer sales up 2%
K-shaped recovery with high-end resilient and selective collector behavior

highlights: Minimalist art collection from Henry S. McNeil Jr. to be auctioned by Christie's in May
Shift towards historical relevance and strong provenance in collector focus
Online sales moderated, declining 11% to $9.2 billion
